title: Set Methods
content:
### Set Methods Reference

---

### Adding/Removing

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `.add(x)` | Add element `x` |
| `.remove(x)` | Remove `x` (KeyError if missing) |
| `.discard(x)` | Remove `x` (no error if missing) |
| `.pop()` | Remove and return arbitrary item |
| `.clear()` | Remove all items |

---

### Set Operations

| Method | Operator | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `.union(s)` | `|` | All elements from both sets |
| `.intersection(s)` | `&` | Elements in both |
| `.difference(s)` | `-` | Elements in first not in second |
| `.symmetric_difference(s)` | `^` | Elements in either, not both |
| `.update(s)` | `|=` | Add all from `s` |
| `.intersection_update(s)` | `&=` | Keep only elements in both |
| `.difference_update(s)` | `-=` | Remove elements in `s` |
| `.symmetric_difference_update(s)` | `^=` | Keep elements not in both |

---

### Comparison Methods

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `.issubset(s)` | True if all items are in `s` |
| `.issuperset(s)` | True if `s` has all items |
| `.isdisjoint(s)` | True if no common items |

```python
a = {1, 2, 3}
b = {1, 2}

print(b.issubset(a))   # True (b is subset of a)
print(a.issuperset(b)) # True (a is superset of b)
print({1, 2}.isdisjoint({3, 4}))  # True
print(a.isdisjoint(b)) # False (share 1, 2)
```

---

### Operator Equivalents

```python
a = {1, 2, 3}
b = {1, 2}

print(b <= a)  # True (subset)
print(a >= b)  # True (superset)
print(a > b)   # True (proper superset -- a has more items)
```

> **Best Practice:** Use operators (`|`, `&`, `-`, `^`, `<=`, `>=`) for readability. Use methods for dynamic behavior (method references).
codeExample:
a = {1, 2, 3, 4}
b = {3, 4, 5, 6}

print("Union:", a | b)
print("Intersection:", a & b)
print("Difference:", a - b)
print("Symmetric:", a ^ b)

print("Is {1,2} subset of a?", {1, 2}.issubset(a))
print("Are they disjoint?", a.isdisjoint({7, 8}))

# In-place
c = {1, 2, 3}
c.update([4, 5])
print("After update:", c)

quiz.question: Which method checks if two sets have no common elements?
